title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・盾の重さ

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew... That parade wasn't exactly elegant...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is so fast and strong... Not to mention
that hill...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It felt so much steeper than usual... My legs felt
paralyzed from the pressure...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So this is a long-distance G1 race... This is the
spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well done to you, Doto. Your performance as my
guide was satisfactory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But you mustn't forget, should you wish to run by
my side, this year's repertoire will be replete with
arduous paths, much like in today's experience.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I u-understand... I promise to be more
diligent next time!

She solemnly swears to improve herself. Keeping
up with T.M. Opera O on the road ahead won't be
an easy feat.
